title: Instagram Vienna food offers input
description: Find active or upcoming free food, free drink, and BOGO offers on Instagram posts in Vienna.

seedAccounts.title: Seed accounts
seedAccounts.description: Instagram account handles to crawl as source pages.

verifiedViennaAccounts.title: Verified Vienna accounts
verifiedViennaAccounts.description: Subset of seed accounts whose Vienna location was verified by the watchlist or merchant registry. Other accounts still need explicit Vienna evidence in the post.

seedHashtags.title: Seed hashtags
seedHashtags.description: Instagram hashtag pages to crawl for candidate post links.

maxPostsPerSource.title: Max posts per source
maxPostsPerSource.description: Maximum number of the newest Instagram post URLs to collect from each source page.

maxPostsToInspect.title: Max posts to inspect
maxPostsToInspect.description: Global cap for Instagram post pages opened during a run.

maxPostAgeDays.title: Hard maximum post age
maxPostAgeDays.description: Reject every post older than this, even if its text contains an explicit validity date. A real Instagram timestamp is mandatory.

maxAgeDaysWithoutExplicitValidity.title: Max age without explicit validity
maxAgeDaysWithoutExplicitValidity.description: If a post does not mention an explicit end date, keep it only when the post itself is newer than this many days.

maxFutureValidityDays.title: Max future validity days
maxFutureValidityDays.description: Reject posts whose explicit validity end date is implausibly far in the future.

cookieString.title: Instagram cookies
cookieString.description: Optional cookie header string copied from a logged-in browser session. Helps if Instagram limits anonymous access.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify proxy settings for the crawler.

debugMode.title: Debug mode
debugMode.description: Store extra debug fields such as full page text samples and rejection reasons.
